storyboard.content: Severe, throbbing headache mainly on one side of my head that has been getting progressively worse over the past month
I feel nauseous and have been vomiting during these episodes
I am very sensitive to light and sound when the headaches hit
Last night's headache lasted 6 hours and did not respond to my usual migraine medication at all
I have had migraines for a while, but over the past 3 months they have been coming more often and getting worse; the latest one was last night and lasted 6 hours
Pain reaches 9 out of 10 during episodes and I am completely unable to function
35-year-old female with a known history of migraines
